title: Pricing recommendations & how to price your app optimally

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve been working with pricing experts Untapped to create a set of recommendations for you to price your app.

The result is an extensive document that answers 6 main questions, based on the most common topics our community members have asked about:

  1. Do I used seat-based or feature based plans?
  2. How many plans should I offer?
  3. What do I include in each plan?
  4. How do I price each plan?
  5. Should I offer a free plan or a free trial?
  6. How should i use discounts?

Download the pricing report now!
